name: modal
visual_summary: A modal is a dialog box that pops up to display additional information or require user interaction. It is often used to prompt users to take an action or make a decision. Modals are commonly used in applications that need to confirm actions or provide more information to the user.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready modal component with the following characteristics:

Name: modal
Description: A modal is a dialog box that pops up to display additional information or require user interaction. It is often used to prompt users to take an action or make a decision. Modals are commonly used in applications that need to confirm actions or provide more information to the user.
Style: e.g. light, dark, overlay
Interactions: e.g. closable, dismissable
Tags: ui component, dialog, popup

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/react/src/components/modal/index.ts
import type {ComponentProps} from "react";

import {
  ModalBackdrop,
  ModalBody,
  ModalCloseTrigger,
  ModalContainer,
  ModalDialog,
  ModalFooter,
  ModalHeader,
  ModalHeading,
  ModalIcon,
  ModalRoot,
  ModalTrigger,
} from "./modal";
